title: Price & stock monitor output
description: Each run writes one dataset row per monitored product. When Save price history is enabled, rolling snapshots are also stored in the price-history key-value store for the next run.

products.title: All products
products.description: Full results table — current price, stock, change flags, and alert status for every monitored URL.

alerts.title: Alerts & changes
alerts.description: Focused view of price, stock, and alert fields. Filter rows where alert is true for webhook integrations.

details.title: Full product details
details.description: Extended fields including images, description, seller, SKU, and search metadata.

pricing.title: Pricing analysis
pricing.description: Price, discount, and history stats for deal tracking.

priceHistory.title: Price history store
priceHistory.description: Persistent JSON records (one per product URL) used to compare prices across scheduled runs. Only populated when Save price history is enabled.
